description:
UI Process Entry Point for the MQI Communicator Dashboard.

This script initializes all necessary components and starts the display
manager in its own process space.

classes.name: DashboardLogger
classes.docstring: A logger that only writes to files, not console, for dashboard UI.

methods.name: __init__
methods.docstring:
Initialize dashboard logger with file-only output.

        Args:
            name (str): The logger name.
            config (LoggingConfig): The logging configuration settings.

methods.name: _setup_file_handler_only
methods.docstring: Setup only file handler, no console output.

methods.name: _create_json_formatter
methods.docstring: Create a JSON formatter for structured logging.

methods.name: _log_with_context
methods.docstring: Log a message with structured context.

methods.name: debug
methods.docstring: Log a debug message with optional context.

methods.name: info
methods.docstring: Log an info message with optional context.

methods.name: warning
methods.docstring: Log a warning message with optional context.

methods.name: error
methods.docstring: Log an error message with optional context.

methods.name: critical
methods.docstring: Log a critical message with optional context.

classes.name: DashboardProcess
classes.docstring:
Main dashboard process controller.

    This class is responsible for initializing and managing the UI components
    in a separate process.

methods.name: __init__
methods.docstring:
Initialize the dashboard process.

        Args:
            database_path (str): The path to the SQLite database file.
            config_path (Optional[str]): Path to the YAML configuration file.

methods.name: initialize_logging
methods.docstring: Initialize logging for the UI process.

methods.name: setup_database_components
methods.docstring:
Setup the database connection and repositories.

        Returns:
            tuple[CaseRepository, GpuRepository]: A tuple containing the case and GPU repositories.

methods.name: run
methods.docstring: The main run loop for the dashboard process.
